symptom_description: Found heavy fluid dripping constantly from pump stuffing box area. Pool of process fluid accumulating on baseplate. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to MOTOR-102.
root_cause: Shaft runout exceeding 0.003 inches caused uneven wear on mechanical seal stationary face.
action_taken: Removed pump casing, replaced cartridge mechanical seal assembly, and flushed seal supply piping.
parts_used: Mechanical Seal Repair Kit, Viton O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Loud high-pitched squealing and metallic clattering from bearing pedestal. Oil level check showed significant discoloration and metal debris. Ops reported load fluctuations on MOTOR-102 coinciding with this fault.
root_cause: Lack of lubrication following oil ring hangup inside bearing housing reservoir.
action_taken: Replaced both inboard and outboard radial/thrust bearings, flushed bearing housing, and added fresh synthetic ISO VG 68 oil.
parts_used: Thrust Bearing Assembly, Constant Level Oiler, Oil Sight Glass

symptom_description: Ops noted pump running smoothly but failing to meet process target gpm. Hydraulic performance curve shift suspected.
root_cause: Severe erosive wear on impeller vanes due to entrained abrasive solid particulates over extended runtime.
action_taken: Swapped out worn impeller assembly and renewed shaft locking nut and key.
parts_used: 316SS Impeller, Casing Wear Ring, Impeller Key

symptom_description: Mechanical seal weeping gradual volume of fluid onto skid plate. Seal reservoir pressure dropping steadily over 24 hrs.
root_cause: Shaft runout exceeding 0.003 inches caused uneven wear on mechanical seal stationary face.
action_taken: Realigned motor and pump shaft to reduce runout, then installed new single cartridge mechanical seal.
parts_used: Single Mechanical Seal, Shaft Sleeve, Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Pump unable to maintain rated head (`14` PSI drop from curve). Motor amp draw is noticeable lower than baseline.
root_cause: Chemical corrosion thinned outer shroud of bronze impeller, leading to internal recirculation.
action_taken: Upgraded impeller to hardened duplex alloy and set proper impeller-to-casing clearances.
parts_used: 316SS Impeller, Casing Wear Ring, Impeller Key

symptom_description: Pump making loud grinding right after morning startup. Discharge flow dropping intermittently with high casing vibration.
root_cause: Operating pump excessively far out beyond its Best Efficiency Point (BEP) during high production demand.
action_taken: Flushed suction piping line with high-pressure water and inspected impeller eye for early pitting signs.
parts_used: Suction Valve Packing Rings, O-Ring Kit

symptom_description: Bearing housing running extremely hot and vibrating extreme. Unit shut down immediately by maintenance roundsman.
root_cause: Lube oil contamination with process fluid/water caused breakdown of oil film and subsequent spalling of bearing races.
action_taken: Pulled bearing frame, pressed on new SKF angular contact bearings, replaced lip seals, and realigned shaft.
parts_used: SKF Outboard Angular Contact Bearing, Inboard Roller Bearing, ISO VG 68 Lube Oil

symptom_description: Elevated bearing housing temperature (`90`°C measured via infrared gun) along with intermittent clicking sound from thrust end. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on MOTOR-102.
root_cause: Improper bearing preload and excessive axial thrust load caused premature cage fracture.
action_taken: Pulled bearing frame, pressed on new SKF angular contact bearings, replaced lip seals, and realigned shaft.
parts_used: Bearing Kit 6309-C3, Lip Seal Set, Shim Pack

symptom_description: Excessive recirculation noise inside casing and gradual pressure drop across pump discharge flange. High load demand from driven equipment (MOTOR-102) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Cavitation erosion over past 12 months eroded vane tips and widened wear ring clearances.
action_taken: Upgraded impeller to hardened duplex alloy and set proper impeller-to-casing clearances.
parts_used: Impeller Assembly, Front and Rear Wear Rings, Casing Gasket

symptom_description: Bearing housing running extremely hot and vibrating drastic. Unit shut down immediately by maintenance roundsman.
root_cause: Fatigue failure of rolling elements due to prolonged operation with slight angular misalignment.
action_taken: Replaced thrust bearing housing assembly, renewed oil seals, and verified dynamic balance.
parts_used: Radial Bearing, Thrust Bearing Set, Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Unit exhibiting severe vibration across coupling guard after recent pipework modification nearby. Unit overdrawing current when MOTOR-102 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Foundation settling and normal vibration shifting over time degraded precision laser alignment.
action_taken: Performed precision laser alignment between pump and driving motor, bringing angular and parallel offset within 0.002 inches.
parts_used: Elastomeric Coupling Insert, Precision Stainless Steel Shim Pack

symptom_description: Unit exhibiting noticeable vibration across coupling guard after recent pipework modification nearby.
root_cause: Soft foot condition under motor baseplate (`0.012` inch gap) causing shifting during anchor bolt torquing.
action_taken: Replaced worn elastomeric coupling insert and re-laser aligned pump/motor train to tight tolerance.

symptom_description: Gradual degradation in discharge flow (`minor` reduction). Casing inspection revealed persistent internal turbulence and hissing. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit MOTOR-102.
root_cause: Chemical corrosion thinned outer shroud of bronze impeller, leading to internal recirculation.
action_taken: Disassembled pump rotating element, installed new 316SS trimmed impeller and casing wear rings.
parts_used: Impeller Assembly, Front and Rear Wear Rings, Casing Gasket

symptom_description: Coupling insert wearing rapidly (`concerning` shedding of elastomeric dust). High radial vibration measured on inboard bearing pads.
root_cause: Thermal growth differential between pump and motor not compensated for during initial cold alignment.
action_taken: Performed precision laser alignment between pump and driving motor, bringing angular and parallel offset within 0.002 inches.

symptom_description: Gradual degradation in discharge flow (`noticeable` reduction). Casing inspection revealed intermittent internal turbulence and cavitation crackling.
root_cause: Severe erosive wear on impeller vanes due to entrained abrasive solid particulates over extended runtime.
action_taken: Disassembled pump rotating element, installed new 316SS trimmed impeller and casing wear rings.
parts_used: Duplex Stainless Impeller, Wear Ring Kit
